---
title: "The Rev. Charles Wareing Endell Bardsley"
---

## The Rev. Charles Wareing Endell Bardsley

**Dates:** (1843-1898)

### Description

Vicar of Ulverston

### Biography

He was the author of the first standard work on English surnames and contributor to the Bluebell series [BL cat; <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
